sources.title: Percy, 1971
sources.description: Young man suffers an accident that somehow removes his most private part. Fortunately for him, the other guy involved in the accident also dies, so there is a donor available. Elke Sommer and Britt Ekland in bit parts.

metadata.Plot: Edwin Antony (Hywel Bennett) is emasculated in an accident which kills a young philanderer. Doctors successfully replace his member with that of the dead man, but refuse to tell him the full story of the organ's origin. So Edwin begins a search which takes him to the philanderer's wife - and also to his many, many girlfriends...
metadata.Writer: Raymond Hitchcock, Terence Feely, Hugh Leonard
metadata.Actors: Hywel Bennett, Denholm Elliott, Cyd Hayman
